summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Global Leaderboard UI redesign. All core functionality working perfectly with premium competitive sports visual design.

minor_observations.issue: Container max-width shows 'none' in computed styles
minor_observations.impact: Visual appears centered and bounded, but should verify max-width constraint is properly applied

passed_tests: ✅ Leaderboard page loads at /leaderboard without errors
✅ Global tab shows leaderboard with centered podium (2nd|1st|3rd layout)
✅ Podium shows correct users: CR7_Fan (2,450), MessiGoat (2,180), Haaland9 (1,950)
✅ 1st place has crown icon and gold/amber styling with visual dominance
✅ Table section shows remaining users (MbaKing, SalahKing, etc.) ranked 4-11
✅ Table header shows all columns: #, PLAYER, LEVEL, POINTS, ACC
✅ Accuracy percentage shown with color coding
✅ Weekly tab works and shows weekly leaderboard data with date range
✅ Tab switching between Weekly and Global works correctly
✅ API /api/football/leaderboard returns 11 users sorted by points descending
✅ API /api/football/leaderboard/weekly returns users and week dates (Mar 2-9)
✅ All expected test users found (CR7_Fan, MessiGoat, Haaland9, MbaKing, SalahKing, ViniJr_7, BellinghamJude, PedriMagic)
✅ Homepage still works after changes (no regressions)
✅ Premium competitive sports visual design achieved
✅ No error messages found on any page
